hotels allocate worset room first if keep silent u have adjust and stay worse smell water leak in air conditioning not clean at all dirt in the pillows broken bed frame all shoudl report complain still say no other rooms then we need to escalate cases to manger to chnage room we book two rooms both happen same after change room its fine dont book express room hotel will chaet u all as this is u book better book upgraded rooms for better experience
this is a really rundown building rooms are really old and unkept old smell the corridors were really bad lifts were working well i won t recommend

stayed here the first time in may and totally impressed by the cleanliness of the place of stay how well equipped it was and a facility that was free for use and star level decided to come again in june with the family for a week long vacation and the impression was still ever lasting customer service is prompt and they genuinely care to provide hospitality now there is a place that is so home away from home each time i am coming back to kl

i booked naibnb for nights we enjoyed our first two nights but the last night was horrible we heard a lot of loud noise coming from the room next to ours late at night my husband and i had to leave for the airport at am and my husband also had a fever and needed proper rest unfortunately because of the nonstop screaming laughing and loud talking outside our door until am we couldn t sleep at all that night we feel very disappointed because we booked this place to rest after long days but instead we had to deal with very unpleasant noise from other guests

the customer service officer was very unhelpful when i informed them that my access card was faulty and unable to grant access to my room floor they did not provide any solution or suggest replacing the card instead they kept questioning whether i had pressed the correct lift button up or down and why i was on a different floor i found these questions unnecessary and felt as though i was being treated like an idiot as if i did not know how to use a lift in the end they did not resolve the issue at all regarding cleanliness i was also very disappointed there was hair on both the bedsheets and the sofa making it seem as though they had not been properly cleaned in addition the corridor outside the room was dirty and poorly maintained overall the customer service and cleanliness standards were far below expectations
no working table

the apartment was nice and clean getting the keys was easy the elevator was a big problem the card did not work well and it was very frustrating trying to go up and down also the apartment had no towels so we had to get them from the office no dish towels either or paper towels for when we accidentally spilled something the complex was confusing the apartment was very comfortable for us otherwise

please do not stay here the tv booth was broken hour wait from pm untill am still not okay ask for a refund do not share it last time you can change rooms at am deposit rm staff inform refund within hours but no refund after hours calling several times no answer after informing will report police then get deposit
requested for room change they changed it and still no air cond it is was hot could not sleep for days
air conditioning is not working the room was not cleaned even after asking the cleaner several times

we order the non smooking room yes they gave us that room but the the host doesn t told us that the environment around the unit is smooking area so the smoke of the cigarette entered the unit especially in the bathroom room living room main bedroom i really concerned about this cause i traveled with infant so i asked to move into another room but they only provide ozone machine installation options and the room still smells of cigarettes last there s a cockroach below the sink so i request to give refund go to find another apartment

i am really impressed that this hotel has a quiet zone they accommodated to my request of high floor and quiet room while it is nowhere as fancy or well equipped as sunway resort i appreciate the cleanliness and attentiveness of housekeeping the fact that it is linked to the mall many food and shopping options made it worthwhile
guard and suite staff are rude
the staff service is extremely poor will not book again in the future at all bad service

i really enjoyed my stay at naibnb the view from the room was incredible and the staff in reception are super helpful they kept my luggage safe and in very professional way and the whole experience was perfect i highly recommend this place
good staff at reception other than that everything is normal

the reception is fully on service and without messy the room is clean with few basic necessities room service is available daily the pool is a bonus for stay all in all it s quite a comfortable stay with a competitive price recommended
never prefer the property
dirty very strong smells of cigarettes

according to the out door parking charges table i received the fee is rm for the first hours and rm for every additional hour i parked from pm until am the next morning which is a total of hours based on the stated charges the total should be rm rm for the first hours rm for the additional hours however customer service charged me rm i was informed that after am the charges reset for another hour block but this condition was not stated or declared in the parking charge schedule provided
nice room but bad sewerage system bad smell coming from the toilet kitchen sink other than that its a great place to stay
parking underground with narrow turning parking is charged rm for hotel guest good location room okay they provide coway each floor however hot water not functioning
the room is not well taken care off the building looks dodgy no safe for a girl to live alone there was a funky smell from the bathroom cupboards mouldy better effort needs to be taken
all okay just need to improve cleanliness
the place is so pretty especially the view from the living room was so breathtaking i highly recommend the place and we ll surely go back
value staying strategy location

unexpected cheap price but very beautiful room level has a beautiful view please check out before o clock if there is still a charge of rm in minutes there will be charge no so in total i pay rm so take note guys overall okay
everything was good just the pillows are too soft better to change to slightly hard will be good
i called multiple times to ensure the room was confirmed but unfortunately we did not get the room we asked for even after the staffs mentioned the rooms were confirmed however we got an upgrade
cheap clean worth it many restaurants nearby central

just knew that deface suite and the face suite is same building knowing that deface suite is a private check in when we arrived in the lobby staff will not cares about you you have to wait the owner of the suite you book on line however the room is huge good for the family i book bedroom premium suite big toilets large living room with kitchen dinning and access to swimming pool with nice view of petrona tower
be prepared to pay extra bucks for the parking only spent almost bucks just for parking for day

it is good if you are hosting a huge group of friends and family the pool view is gorgeous as well also it is a walking distance from monorail and to klcc if you don t mind walking it s fine they should have imposed shutter bus every hour or so however please note that they will request a rm deposit and they could only refund to local account number only which is ridiculous to tourists please impose a card deposit just like any other hotels serviced appartments
nice and comfortable

i had a lovely stay here the room was cozy and enough for a couple with many stuff and big baggages the staff was helpful and responsive one unfortunate thing was the bidet is leaky everytime it was used so it makes the bathroom floor wet and splash us but overall it is a great stay so definitely would recommend this studio to others

too much hidden policy when check in management is worst request safety deposit during check in bigger than perday price the signage is printed in a paper stick here and there for direction and block what kind of luxury is that
the room is good large spacious clean and worth the money spent the location is easily accessible and in the city center with a view of the twin towers as well

this particulr unit we stayed in the flushing sysyem is not okay very bad stinking sewerage odour so bad my husband had headache in general this property need to work on their hygiebe level espeially the toilets all must have double sewerage cover and their trash areas really stink toilets flush ng system need to be looked into we had stayed in differen units in this property hjis is the conclusion for this property in general

the building condition of this hotel property is terribly bad and poorly maintained there is a smell of cockroaches along the corridor it is dark and humid in the room the bed sheet is dirty as well overall stronly discourage not recommend you to stay
this place is definitely haunted heard crying noise footsteps and loud banging on the door that went on for hours if you ever end up here by any chance do not open the door at night
the room okay but the air conditioning not cool sweating in the night cause if the aitrcond
great location and staffs were friendly throughout my stay rooms were spacious and clean

check in was quick but the room was full of dust worms cement worms plaster bagworms most on the ceiling above the head of the bed on the ceiling in the bathroom even on the mattress i did not notice at first because i checked in late at night and i was tired the next day i noticed a lot as if these rooms had never been vacuumed they looked neat but they were dusty book twin bed means there are people but one cup there are no towels or floor mats just go out of the bathroom and the floor is wet there are mosquitoes in the room i ve already killed there are still more it is hard to chase check in was easy and smooth on the g floor there is a kmart parking basement rm per hour

on the day that i was supposed to check in i was informed that it might be delayed due to housekeeping that affected my plan for the day honestly and the next day when me and my friend wanted to go out we were faced with an elevator jam a lot of people from our floor were waiting for their turns we asked a family how long were they waiting and they told us it was more than half an hour and so we decided to take the stairs from the th floor as we do not want to waste our time waiting please do something about the lifts its worse to deal with this during the holidays other than that minor issue but its still an issue nonetheless we cant watch netflix due to high traffic since i guess everyone is also using it so please dont be cheap and make more accounts also the shower drain takes so long to drain the water it only needs a minute for the shower place to flood please fix all of these thank you
sewer issue was quite bad as the pungent smell occupies the whole room it affects my sleep quality as i kept waking up to the smell
i found this apartment at the top of agoda list nearby the trx mall there are lots of cafe and bakery nearby the space was clean and beautifully decorated
mins walk to pavillion good sour dough sandwich cafe just below the service naibnb provided was excellent photo taken from living room window
the hotel is very clean very cheap for a high hospitality given by the staff highly recommended to people for first timer

pros near to trx shopping mall need to walk about mins km from trx mrt station nice short walk daily to apartment spacious apartment very comfortable all kitchens utensils are provided in the apartment cons the self check in might be a bit fussy bcos once wrongly enter the code for the door need to wait mins for the door system to self reset but the staffs at the building opposite of the apartment is helpful the lift there are lifts but only are working everyone need to queue to get into the lift everytime which is very inconvenient but overall tolerable

we booked a two bedroom with two bathroom but we are given a one bathroom only we highlight to the staff but they are reluctant to assist eventhough we inform they got a wrong details not recommended at all
they took additional deposit rm and now already days said will refund the deposit to my bank account and never did please beware
a very good convenient stay with family
great access and walkability to shopping cleanliness and facilities are okay staff interaction were mixed
pros link to sunway pyramid cons really really hard to find a parking there is no complimentary flat rate free parking for hotel guest

booked a studio not even a single thing i found bad everything was just amazing mainly the views i had got studio in st floor amazing the facilities are amazing they have nice sundeck view on th floor b wing nice place for watch sunset it s really a luxurious style of apartment with very affordable cost

horrible hotel so deserted everything no good and is so old everything breaking down tv not working is not a shopping center but only a few provision shop you cannot get what you want check in staff are rude the whole place looks abandoned haunted and do not feel safe highly not recommended
overall everything s okay except for the tv always faulty should rectify this
the staff are slow to our call for towel replacement they miss out making up our room on one day
a bit disappointed because i booked a room with a different picture i got a room that was not the same as the one in the picture

superior room was good enough for the price with controllable air conditioning strong and consistent shower room is tight and my room condition was acceptable but must have room cleaning sign displayed for room to be cleaned daily and supplies filled bottle water not given automatically while there is water dispenser at lift lobby sound insulation is low check in an out was fast
bangla staff near the reception is a bit unhelpful the room is okay only the elevator only opens slow the rest are okay
the room we get was at level it s old and mouldy it s totally different from the picture we saw very disappointing somehow the room is very old and not clean a lot dust in the air
because of the location we stay there need make improvement
the shower drainer never clean water difficult to flow through mattress sunk in room without window with moisture smell
best stay everrrrr well recommend

the pool and breakfast was in another hotel u would need to walk to another block to get to the pool and breakfast room was small although i already booked a deluxe room will not come back again for the price
apartment is clean and well furnished i really enjoy staying there and will return if i come back to kl the staff are very attentive and respond quickly with any minor complaint in the apt
i book this hotel for business purpose in the end the date schedule last minute change agoda not allow we change the date

this apartment is suitable for anyone who looking for a spacious place walking distance to bukit bintang area especially trx exchange alot of shopping food area within a short walking distance its literally minutes walk to trx and bukit bintang areas however there is no dedicated area for pedestrian on the way to trx but to bukit bintang it is convenience we got th floor unit on our stay just below the roof top th floor its so high that the wait and time at the elevator is not as convenient as you can take more than mins just to wait for the lift and going down to the lobby would suggest communicate in advance to the guest to check their comfort level or can also price it differently in the expense of convenience in anyway we don t see any view or other value to stay in the high floor the unit itself marketed as japandi design quite spacious living room but very small no window second bedroom on the day we arrived it was heavy rain and there was water leakage from the window in the living room apartment facility is pretty complete washing machine full kitchen large fridge super high speed internet however during our stay they washing machine was broken on cleanliness hope they can regularly replace the bed sheet it was brown color bedsheet due to the japandi design while it may be cleaned but can easily see stained on the brown color bedsheet last point i think they need to better invest on the bed mattress on the main bedroom i believe people come for the sleeping comfort can clearly say it was a cheap mattress can feel the spring when you sleep on it a decent mattress would definitely improve guest comfort
